rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>A silky-soft Rito-down bed is made with
looots of Rito feathers. It's soft and fluffy
and gives the bestest sleeps ever.<PageBreak>If you only sleep in one bed here at the
Swallow's Roost, make it that one!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>As soon my head hits the pillow, it's like
someone threw a blanket over me. <unk[5:0]>N-not
that I ever use the beds!<PageBreak>When you wake up again, you'll be full of
energy and ready to go!

rows.JPja: お<Ruby={2:4}とま>泊りなら こちら～
rows.USen: Why stay anywhere else?

rows.CNzh:

还挺了不起的吧？

很了不起對吧？

<unk[3:0:264]>これからも お<Ruby={2:4}みせ>店のお<Ruby={4:6}てつだ>手伝いは<Ruby={2:4}つづ>続けるんだよ！<unk[5:0]>
えらいでしょ？

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>I'm making sure the beds are tidy so our
guests can sleep soundly!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:264]>I don't have to run the whole inn now,
but I still wanna help! <unk[5:0]>Pretty grown-up of
me, huh?<PageBreak><unk[3:0:256]>Make sure you come and stay with us
whenever you're tired, mister!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我正在把床铺收拾得整齐又干净，
这样来投宿的客人就能随到随用了！
<unk[3:0:268]>有几次我差点就不知不觉打起瞌睡来了，
不过我可以忍住……
<unk[3:0:263]>也欢迎大哥哥随时来住宿哦！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我正在把床鋪整理乾淨，
讓來投宿的客人隨時都能入住！

<unk[3:0:263]>歡迎大哥哥隨時來住宿喔！

<unk[3:0:7]>I'm making sure the beds are tidy so our
guests can sleep soundly!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:268]>Sometimes I end up taking a nap without

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>I'm checking the beds to make sure that

sleep when they stay with us.<PageBreak>Every single bed is super soft!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:264]>Hee-hee-hee. I don't have to run the inn,
but I'm still working hard to help out.<unk[5:0]>
Come and stay with us anytime, mister!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我正在准备床铺，
这样来投宿的客人就能随到随用了～！
<unk[3:0:268]>太阳一下山我就会犯困，
要忍住才行……
<unk[3:0:263]>也欢迎大哥哥随时来住宿哦～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>為了隨時讓來投宿的客人都能睡個好覺，
我正在準備床鋪～！
<unk[3:0:268]>每天傍晚過後我就會開始想睡覺，
得忍住才行……
<unk[3:0:263]>歡迎大哥哥隨時來住宿喔～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>お<Ruby={2:4}とま>泊りに<Ruby={2:2}き>来たお<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さんが いつでも<Ruby={2:4}やす>休めるように
ベッドの<Ruby={4:8}じゅんび>準備をしているんだよ～！
<unk[3:0:268]><Ruby={4:8}ゆうがた>夕方を<Ruby={2:2}す>過ぎると <Ruby={2:4}ねむ>眠たくなってきちゃうけど
がまんがまん…
<unk[3:0:263]>お<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃんも いつでもお<Ruby={2:4}とま>泊りしに<Ruby={2:2}き>来てね～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I'm preparing the beds so any guest who
comes to stay gets a good sleep!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:268]>I get too sleepy to work when the sun
starts to go down, but I'll get the hang
of it.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:263]>Come and stay with us anytime, mister!

rows.JPja: うぅ… もう<Ruby={2:4}ねむ>眠たいや…
rows.USen: So...very...tired...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>你听我说哦，如果熬夜导致睡眠不足，
第二天工作的时候可能会打瞌睡对吧？
所以我决定在晚上好好睡觉，<unk[5:0]>
大哥哥也注意不要熬夜哦～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>聽我說～如果因熬夜導致睡眠不足的話，
有可能會在工作中打起瞌睡來喔。
所以我決定在晚上好好地睡飽，<unk[5:0]>
大哥哥也要注意別熬夜囉～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>あのね <Ruby={2:2}よ>夜ふかしして スイミン<Ruby={4:6}ぶそく>不足になると
<Ruby={6:12}しごとちゅう>仕事中に <Ruby={4:6}いねむ>居眠りしちゃうかもしれないでしょ？
だから<Ruby={2:4}よる>夜は いっぱい <Ruby={2:4}ねむ>眠ることに<Ruby={2:2}き>決めてるの<unk[5:0]>
お<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄ちゃんも <Ruby={2:2}よ>夜ふかししないようにね～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>If you stay up late and don't get enough
sleep, you might conk out on the job.<PageBreak>So I always get plenty of sleep. You don't
stay up too late either, OK, mister?

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}よこ>横になりたい…

rows.CNzh:
